WifiState.description: Indicates ESP32 connection status to the local station or Access Point.

NanoState.description: Indicates communication status between ESP32 and Arduino Nano.

GrblState.description: Current state reported by the GRBL motion engine.

OperationState.description: Overall operational state machine for autonomous sweeps and tool runs.

EnvironmentState.description: Weather-gating state based on local ambient and analog rain sensors.

StateUpdate.description: Broadcasts complete system status snapshot at regular intervals or state changes.

fields.name: flags
fields.description: Bitmask of active boolean flags (e.g. streaming, scan ready)

fields.name: x
fields.description: Current gantry X position in mm

fields.name: y
fields.description: Current gantry Y position in mm

fields.name: z
fields.description: Current gantry Z position in mm

PositionUpdate.description: Lightweight, high-frequency position-only update sent during active gantry motion.

fields.name: x
fields.description: Current gantry X position in mm

fields.name: y
fields.description: Current gantry Y position in mm

fields.name: z
fields.description: Current gantry Z position in mm

NpkReading.description: Single soil NPK and atmospheric telemetry reading.

fields.name: x
fields.description: X coordinate of soil dip in mm

fields.name: y
fields.description: Y coordinate of soil dip in mm

CmdPing.description: Outbound latency query sent from Flutter to ESP32.

CmdPong.description: Inbound latency reply sent from ESP32 back to Flutter.
